summary: Promoted ADR 0292 Apache Superset into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.129` and first verified platform version `0.130.82` after refreshing from the latest realistic `origin/main` commit `3ccef3ea09cba8a3b5f4f46af28713aad4b8fb9e`. The exact-main replay re-verified `bi.example.com` on top of the shared Keycloak, PostgreSQL, MinIO, and Restic contracts, preserved the governed datasource and dashboard bootstrap, and recorded the Python 3.9 vulnerability-budget compatibility repair plus the shared Docker-runtime disk-pressure recovery evidence needed to keep future replays trustworthy.

verification.check: Superset-focused regression coverage and recovery follow-ups
verification.observed: The branch retained the earlier Superset contract regression bundle (`104 passed`) and then added fresh focused coverage for the stale-task MinIO recovery path (`5 passed`) and Python 3.9 vulnerability-budget compatibility (`5 passed`), preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-targeted-tests-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-minio-recovery-tests-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-vulnerability-budget-tests-r1.txt`.

The final `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=superset env=production` replay completed cleanly on the integrated release tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-mainline-live-apply-r3.txt`, with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=316 changed=2 failed=0`, `localhost : ok=24 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=46 changed=4 failed=0`, and `postgres-lv3 : ok=80 changed=0 failed=0`.

Fresh local verification on `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed healthy `superset` and `superset-openbao-agent` containers plus a successful `verify-local` report, while the public verification confirmed `https://bi.example.com/health`, the expected `sso.example.com` redirect host, and the managed dashboard plus chart contract; the transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-direct-runtime-verification-r2.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-public-verification-r3.txt`.

verification.check: Shared backup and disk-pressure recovery dependency
verification.observed: After reclaiming safe cache and journal space on `docker-runtime-lv3`, the shared MinIO converge, Restic trigger, and exact-main Superset replay all recovered cleanly; the evidence is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-docker-runtime-disk-pressure-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-docker-runtime-disk-pressure-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-minio-converge-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-restic-trigger-r4.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-mainline-live-apply-r3.txt`.

verification.check: Integrated repository automation and remote validation bundle
verification.observed: The integrated tree passed `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, `make pre-push-gate`, and `make check-build-server`, preserving the local validation sweep, remote lane selection, primary-branch pre-push gate, and build-server snapshot dry-run evidence in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-mainline-validate-r4.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-mainline-remote-validate-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-mainline-check-build-server-r1.txt`.

notes: This receipt records the first verified `main`-integrated platform promotion for ADR 0292 Apache Superset.

The integrated replay started from latest realistic `origin/main` commit `3ccef3ea09cba8a3b5f4f46af28713aad4b8fb9e`, which still carried repository version `0.177.128` and platform version `0.130.81` before this promotion.

The exact-main wrapper initially surfaced a Python 3.9 annotation-evaluation traceback from the vulnerability-budget preflight; adding `from __future__ import annotations` to `scripts/container_image_policy.py` and `scripts/vulnerability_budget.py` restored compatibility without weakening the gate.

The shared `docker-runtime-lv3` host had also accumulated enough disk pressure to block MinIO and the MinIO-backed Restic path; the final proof set keeps that operator-facing recovery documented rather than hiding it behind ad hoc retries.

Controller-side `make restic-config-backup env=production` still timed out on `restic snapshots --json` even after widening the probe budget to 180 seconds, while the earlier live-apply-service trigger reported success without materializing a new runtime receipt file; `scripts/trigger_restic_live_apply.py` now syncs receipt artifacts back into the repo when they exist, and the timeout evidence is preserved for ADR 0302 follow-up work.

correction_loop.repair_action: Extended the MinIO runtime rescue path to recover both missing compose-network state and stale containerd task collisions, then reran the shared MinIO converge, Restic trigger, vulnerability-budget preflight, and exact-main Superset live-apply wrapper until the runtime, public edge, and backup contract all passed from the integrated release tree.
